purpose: Define the minimum contract for converting validated internal W/Z mass modes into absolute GeV predictions without fitting W or Z targets.
forbiddenCalibrationSources: any weighted fit that includes physical-w-boson-mass-gev or physical-z-boson-mass-gev
promotionGates: both W and Z internal source modes are validated
scale source is validated and target-independent with respect to W and Z masses
computed W and Z absolute mass observables have finite propagated uncertainties
claim gate has zero active fatal/high falsifiers for W/Z absolute-mass scope
target comparison is performed after projection and is not used to tune the scale
